chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2980 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15769/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15770/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.10.2025 Mr. Fayaz Ali Metlo, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Habibullah Khan son of Khan Muhammad Amanullah seeks protective bail in FIR No.291/2025 under Section-13, 20, 24 of Prevention of Electronic crimes Act, 2016 r/w 34 & 109, 506 PPC, registered at P.S NCCIA, Cyber Crime Reporting Centre, Circle/Sub- Circle, Islamabad. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated with malafide intention; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his imminent arrest, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 30.10.2025 to 13.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 13.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier.

The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 13.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
